reviews.comment:
Se les había acabado el Gasoil. El resto bueno para descansar un rato

(Translated by Google)
They had run out of diesel. The rest was good for resting for a while.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtcVp5X093EAE

reviews.comment:
Ayer cargue ahí y era solo en efectivo, habiendo tantos medios de pago hoy en día, y lo curioso que el servi si se podía pagar con tarjetas. Raro no? O avivada....

(Translated by Google)
I topped up there yesterday and it was cash only, even though there are so many payment methods these days. And the funny thing is, you could pay for the service with cards. Weird, right? Or a scam...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtMGFXM1NREAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Very clean restrooms. Good service, nice park in the back.
